title: sticherus littoralis
intro: Sticherus littoralis, also known as the Littoral Fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, Sticherus littoralis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
